news.paragraph: Johnson & Johnson recently received an upgrade from Leerink Partners to Outperform with an increased price target of $265. The company is also expanding its medical technology portfolio with the launch of the Shockwave C2 Aero Coronary IVL Catheter and strategic shifts in its immunology segment. Traders should consider these product developments and the analyst upgrade alongside recent share price pullbacks and mixed valuation signals.
headlines: Leerink Partners Upgrades Johnson & Johnson to Outperform From Market Perform, Adjusts PT to $265 From $252
